message.content: DESCRIPTION: A 5‑by‑5 grid. The outer border (first and last rows and columns) is filled with X’s, forming a solid square frame. Inside the border, there are three columns of cells: the central column (third column) is all X’s, while the second and fourth columns each contain a blank square (▢) in rows 2, 3, 4. Thus the interior pattern consists of a vertical line of X’s flanked by two vertical lines of blank squares.
